# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-application
description: A Helm chart for my application with ingress

type: application

version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-application
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-application
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-application
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-app
          image: my-app-image:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-application-service
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: my-application

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: my-application-ingress
spec:
  rules:
    - host: "*"
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: my-application-service
                port:
                  number: 80

---

# values.yaml

replicaCount: 2

image:
  repository: my-app-image
  tag: latest
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: true
  hosts:
    - "*"
